message:
fix(codegen): Multiple fixes for core1 test compilation

- Skip escaping for lazy attribute expressions (try ...) in zig_keywords
- Add unittest lifecycle methods (setUp/setUpClass/tearDownClass) to
  always-need-allocator list
- Fix None→bool conversion: emit 'false' instead of 'null' for bool vars
- Add discards for *args/**kwargs in __init__ methods
- Clear discarded_params between class method generations
- Fix method alias wrapper signatures for NoAllocatorDunderMethods
